description: A signed guestbook entry left on another actor's guestbook marker. The entry record lives on the author's own PDS; the marker it references is owned by the site operator.

text.description: The visible entry body. Short prose, no markdown.

subject.description: AT-URI of the com.imlunahey.guestbook.marker record this entry is signing.

replyTo.description: Optional — AT-URI of another guestbook entry this one is threading under.

langs.description: BCP-47 tags describing the language(s) of `text`.
